title: Timeline based off start date + duration
excerpt: I understand how to use the The Timeline + Numeric Combo Column (Duration Column); however, it always defaults the start date of the timeline to today’s date. Is there a way of adding a start date + duration column to in…

posts.author: energyx-jamie (Jamie)
posts.cookedHtml: I understand how to use the The Timeline + Numeric Combo Column (Duration Column); however, it always defaults the start date of the timeline to today’s date. Is there a way of adding a start date + duration column to inform the timeline?
